name: Suspicious Nodejs Execution of JSC Files Associated with Credential Theft Campaign
description: Detects suspicious Node.js activity involving the execution of .JSC files that load additional JavaScript files, with the parent process being PowerShell. This behavior is associated with an active credential and data exfiltration.

filterSets.name: Suspicious Nodejs Execution of JSC Files Associated with Credential Theft Campaign

author: Ahmed Kamal
